name: Badge
description: A badge is a small indicator placed on another element to show a count or status — the number of unread alerts on the notifications bell, or a dot marking a vehicle that needs attention.
keyRule: Use a badge to draw attention to a count or new state on an icon or item. Keep it glanceable — for detailed status use a status chip instead.

variants.name: Numeric
variants.whenToUse: Show a count (unread alerts, pending tasks).

anatomy.name: Host
anatomy.description: the icon/element the badge sits on.

anatomy.name: Badge
anatomy.description: the small count or dot indicator (usually top-right).

anatomy.name: Content
anatomy.description: a number, capped value ("99+"), or empty dot.

behaviors.name: Capping
behaviors.description: Cap large counts (e.g. 99+) so the badge stays small and readable.

behaviors.name: Zero
behaviors.description: Hide the badge at zero unless "0" is meaningful.

behaviors.name: Live updates
behaviors.description: When the count changes, update it promptly and announce it to assistive tech.

props.name: children
props.description: The host element (icon/button) the badge is anchored to.

props.name: hostLabel
props.description: Accessible label for the host, e.g. "Notifications".

props.name: count
props.description: Numeric count; capped and rendered as "99+" above 99.

props.name: dot
props.description: Renders a dot badge (no number) instead of a numeric pill.

props.name: showZero
props.description: Show the badge even when count is 0. Default false — badge hides at zero.

doThis: Use a dot when a number isn't needed.
dontDoThis: Don't put long text in a badge.
Don't rely on the badge alone to convey critical detail.
accessibility: The host's accessible name includes the badge meaning (e.g. "Notifications, 4 unread").
Changes are announced via a live region.
The dot/number is not the only signal of an important state.

related.name: Chip
related.why: When the label needs words, not just a count

related.name: Tooltip
related.why: Icon-only targets with a badge still need a tooltip
